title: LANMU 2-Pack Pressure Relief Device for Triton,Pressure Relief Device PRD Inc Rubber Ball and O Ring Valve Shower Spares Parts for Triton Electric Showers (Replace of 82800450)
features: Durable Material:This for triton pressure relief device ​is made of high quality ABS material,ensuring more durable and stable use.Complete PRD component design(including rubber ball & O ring), makes your electric shower work more efficiently.

Perfect Compatibility:This shower pressure relief valve is customized design for triton electric shower(Replace of 82800450).Regularly replaces the pressure relief device which can fully protect your electric shower from the dangers of overpressure.

Easy to Install: This shower pressure relief valve is customized design for triton electric shower(Replace of 82800450).Just remove your old pressure relief device and put new PRD replacement in its place,does not leak and protect your triton shower

Widely Compatible with: Our pressure relief device is compatible with triton electric showers, for Triton Agio Electric Shower, Triton Alicante, Triton Amber -triton Aquablast, Triton Aquastorm, Triton Aquasurge, Triton Aquatronic 1 Plus,Triton Aspirante, Triton Aspirante Electric, Triton Aspirante Millenium, Triton Aspirante Topaz, Triton Aspirante Xr, Triton Belize, Triton Bezique 2, Triton Biarritz 2, Triton Biscay 2 (For more models, please refer to our description below)
Package Including:2*Pressure Relief Device,4*Rubber Ball,4*Replacement Screws
description: Product Description High Quality ABS Material Ring Seal and Rubber Ball Safe Device
